news.author: TOI Education
news.title: HP SET admit card 2026 released at hppsc.hp.gov.in: Direct link to download here
news.description: The Himachal Pradesh Public Service Commission has released the HP SET Admit Card 2026 on May 20, 2026, for candidates registered for the test. The admit card is available on the official HPPSC website, hppsc.hp.gov.in, ahead of the June 7, 2026, examination.…

news.author: Saurabh Parashar
news.title: Going grave hunting in Shimla: Meet the man who helps British visitors find their roots, and some closure
news.description: After an unfulfilling stint in Delhi, Sumit Raj Vashisht came back to his hometown Shimla in the 2000s to do ‘something different’ in the tourism industry. A chance encounter with a few visitors from UK, whose ancestors had once made the hill town their home,…
news.content: Its 11 am, and Sumit Vashisht sits in a cozy corner of Shimlas Gaiety Theatre, chatting with a female colleague while keeping an eye on the door. Usually people — especially foreign tourists — start … [+10787 chars]

news.title: Over 10,800 candidates elected unopposed in Himachal Panchayati Raj polls

news.content: After the completion of the nomination withdrawal process for the Panchayati Raj Institutions elections in Himachal Pradesh, as many as 10,854 candidates have been elected unopposed across the state,… [+1940 chars]

news.content: An apple orchardist in Mashobra block of Shimla district has suffered losses amounting to nearly Rs 40 lakh after repeated collapse of crate walls during the ongoing four-lane project on the Kaithlig… [+3054 chars]

news.content: The Himachal Pradesh High Court has criticised the Manali Municipal Councils move for carrying over more than 300 kilometres of untreated waste to Haryanas Ambala, and observed that it would only add… [+4159 chars]

news.title: In an election without party symbols, both BJP & Congress claim victory in Himachal local polls
news.description: Approximately 72.42 per cent polling was recorded in 47 Municipal Councils and Nagar Panchayats elections.
news.content: Both the Congress and the BJP claimed victories in the elections to the 47 Urban Local Bodies (ULBs), including Municipal Councils and Nagar Panchayats, which were not contested on party symbols, hel… [+3595 chars]
